channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iowa State Handles Kansas in Ranked, Big 12 Win, Ends Jayhawks' Winning Streak
item.description: Iowa State overcame a slow start to get a convincing, ranked win over Kansas in a Big 12 conference showdown on Saturday.

item.title: DraftKings Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $300 on Team USA Hockey's Opening Games This Weekend
item.description: DraftKings Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $300 on Team USA Hockey's Opening Games This Weekend.

item.title: FanDuel Promo Code: Bet $5, Get $100 on Any Team USA Hockey Matchup on Opening Weekend

item.title: USA Hockey Odds: How to Bet on Team USA Hockey This Weekend as They Face Denmark and Germany
item.description: USA Hockey Odds: How to Bet on Team USA Hockey This Weekend as They Face Denmark and Germany.

item.title: No. 17 St. John's Beats Providence After 19-Minute Delay for In-Game Fight
item.description: No. 17 St. Johnâs got a road victory over Providence on Saturday, which included a 19-minute delay in the action for a fight.

item.title: Six players ejected in St. John's-Providence clash
item.description: Six players were ejected from Saturday's game Big East clash between No. 17 St. John's and Providence after a hard foul by Friars forward Duncan Powel...

item.title: No. 5 Iowa St. snaps No. 9 Kansas' winning streak
item.description: Milan Momcilovic scored 18 points and No. 5 Iowa State shook off a slow start to defeat No. 9 Kansas 74-56 on Saturday, snapping the Jayhawks' eight-g...

item.title: Source: Fiala's season likely over after surgery
item.description: Kings star Kevin Fiala's leg injury suffered in Switzerland's loss to Canada is likely season-ending, an NHL source told ESPN.

item.title: Accused Canadian curler points finger at Swedes
item.description: Canadian curler Marc Kennedy says his team may be the target of a "premeditated" attack after a Swedish curler accused Kennedy of illegally "double-to...

item.title: U.S. speedskater Stolz wins 2nd gold of Olympics
item.description: American speedskater Jordan Stolz collected his second gold medal of the Olympics, winning the 500-meter race to keep alive his goal of four golds at ...
